content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_skew
P: widen_skew ∧ provider_only ∧ reg_test
V: valid_passes ∧ stale_rejects ∧ "401"_preserved
A: adjust_tolerance ∧ add_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: overdue ∧ "402" ∧ billing_mw
V: no_loop ∧ boundary_exact
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: overdue and "402" and billing_mw.
Verify: no_loop and boundary_exact.
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec
P: fast_delivery ∧ low_ops_load ∧ compliance_ready ∧ steady_traffic
V: single_deploy ∧ pg_schemas ∧ module_bounded
A: ship_monolith ∧ isolate_compliance ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ship_arch
C: team_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops
P: modular_monolith ∧ worker_sidecar ∧ async_enrichment ∧ "PostgreSQL"
V: fits_"6" ∧ meets_"9 weeks" ∧ low_ops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: block_path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitize ∧ baseDir_concat
P: reject_".." ∧ normalize_path ∧ confine_baseDir ∧ whitelist_files
V: traversal_blocked ∧ escape_denied ∧ tests_pass
A: path_resolve ∧ prefix_check ∧ deny_symlinks

[AUDIT]
Goal: block_path_traversal.
Constraints: user_input and "download" and no_sanitize and baseDir_concat.
Plan: reject_".." and normalize_path and confine_baseDir and whitelist_files.
Verify: traversal_blocked and escape_denied and tests_pass.
Answer target: path_resolve and prefix_check and deny_symlinks.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sqli
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input ∧ string_concat
P: sqli ∧ data_exfil ∧ admin_breach
V: whitelist_sort ∧ param_bind ∧ reject_unknown
A: static_scan ∧ pen_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sqli.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input and string_concat.
Plan: sqli and data_exfil and admin_breach.
Verify: whitelist_sort and param_bind and reject_unknown.
Answer target: static_scan and pen_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: anchor_"async" ∧ anchor_"await" ∧ anchor_"next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows→apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err→"next(err)"
A: async_await ∧ minimal_diff

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
A: convert_async_await ∧ wrap_try_catch ∧ call_next

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log.
Answer target: convert_async_await and wrap_try_catch and call_next.
